summary: Completed testing of Schools CRM multi-contact system, tags/filter UI. Fixed 3 critical bugs: (1) /api/schools/tags route order causing 500 error, (2) /api/schools/import-template route order causing 500 error, (3) JSONB cast syntax error in tag filter. All 19 backend tests pass, all frontend UI tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: FastAPI route order matters - static routes like /tags, /import-template, /export-csv must be defined BEFORE dynamic routes like /{school_id}
Use CAST(:param AS jsonb) instead of :param::jsonb in SQLAlchemy with asyncpg to avoid parameter parsing issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: Schools CRM multi-contact system fully tested. Fixed route ordering bugs and JSONB cast syntax. All features working: schools list with contacts array, source/tag filtering, search, tag editing modal, import template download. IČO field confirmed NOT present in API responses.

backend_api.GET /api/schools: PASS - Returns schools with contacts array
backend_api.GET /api/schools/{id}: PASS - Returns single school with contacts

frontend_ui.Import modal: PASS - Shows instructions, file upload, template download
frontend_ui.Tag edit modal: PASS - Shows predefined tags, custom input, save button

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Route /tags was defined AFTER /{school_id}, so 'tags' was being matched as school_id (invalid UUID)
Route /import-template was defined AFTER /{school_id}, so 'import-template' was being matched as school_id
Using :tag::jsonb syntax caused parameter parsing error with asyncpg
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to CAST(:tag AS jsonb) syntax in SQL queries
